CustomField.description: Comma-separated class name patterns to suppress (denylist). Log entries from matching classes are dropped, even when ClassFilter is blank or includes them. Supports trailing wildcard (*). Blank means no class is suppressed. Applied AFTER the ClassFilter allowlist.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Examples: TST_*,SVC_NoisyJob or API_HighVolume*. Blank = nothing suppressed.
CustomField.label: Suppress Class Method
